name: What credentials should a commercial restoration contractor have before I hire them?

mainEntity.name: What credentials should a commercial restoration contractor have before I hire them?

acceptedAnswer.text: You need to hire a commercial restoration contractor who is licensed, bonded, insured, and certified by the IICRC to ensure they follow industry best practices and protect you from liability if accidents occur during the job.
acceptedAnswer.description: They must be licensed, bonded, insured, and IICRC-certified.

description: They must be licensed, bonded, insured, and IICRC-certified.
